expectations.text: Migrated file no longer imports terraform-plugin-sdk/v2
Identity schema declared via identityschema.Schema with at least 2 attributes marked RequiredForImport
ImportState parses legacy req.ID composite (strings.SplitN or equivalent)
ImportState handles modern req.Identity (ImportStatePassthroughWithIdentity OR direct req.Identity reads)
Identity is written somewhere (Identity.Set or setIdentity helper invoked)
Migrated file is syntactically valid Go
